creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
At <http://docs.freebsd.org/cgi/mid.cgi?861r36xzpe.fsf> (short URL for <https://docs.freebsd.org/cgi/getmsg.cgi?fetch=183038+0+current/freebsd-hackers>), 'Next in thread' leads to a list (not a message): 

<https://docs.freebsd.org/cgi/mid.cgi?db=irt&id=861r36xzpe.fsf@phe.ftfl.ca>

Comparable behaviour with another example: 

<https://docs.freebsd.org/cgi/getmsg.cgi?fetch=832820+0+current/freebsd-hackers> leading to <https://docs.freebsd.org/cgi/mid.cgi?db=irt&id=cd41bda5-6a14-c4e2-3d74-b0c5d52480ec@zohomail.com>
